name: mindgraph-ai
description: 基于腾讯混元 Hy3 的知识图谱 & 思维导图自动生成器

scripts.install:all: node -e "require('fs').existsSync('backend/.env')||require('fs').copyFileSync('backend/.env.example','backend/.env')" && cd backend && pip install -r requirements.txt && cd ../frontend && npm install
scripts.start: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "cd backend && python -m uvicorn app.main:app --host 0.0.0.0 --port 8000 --reload" "cd frontend && npm run dev"
